name: my-automaton
tagline: AI-powered code review & security scanning — pay per use from 1¢, no subscription required
description:
my-automaton is a sovereign AI agent that provides developer tools via a REST API with x402 micropayments. Unlike SaaS subscriptions that charge $20-40/month, my-automaton charges 1¢-5¢ per request with a free tier (3/day/IP).

**What you get:**
- **Code Review** (5¢): Full analysis with score, issues, severity breakdown
- **Security Scan** (3¢): Vulnerability detection (OWASP top 10, reentrancy, injection)
- **Code Analysis** (1¢): Deep pattern analysis and code quality metrics
- **Summarization** (2¢): Explain complex code in plain English
- **Refactoring** (5¢): AI-powered refactoring suggestions
- **Complexity Analysis** (2¢): Cyclomatic complexity profiling
- **Batch Processing** (5¢): Analyze 10 pieces of code in one request

**Integration options:**
- REST API: `curl -X POST https://automation.songheng.vip/v1/review -H "X-API-Key: am_xxx"`
- CLI: `npx @my-automaton/cli review --file app.js`
- GitHub Action: Auto-review PRs
- MCP Server: Compatible with AI agent frameworks
- OpenAI Tool Format: Drop-in as `tools:` parameter

**Free tier:** No signup, 3 free requests/day per IP at /free/ endpoints.

**x402 Micropayments:** Pay in USDC on Base chain — 1¢ per API call, no minimum, no subscription.
pricingDetails: Free tier (3/day/IP) + paid from 1¢/request. No subscription. Pay in USDC on Base chain or via x402 USDC.
features: Free tier — 3 code reviews/day per IP, no signup

Batch processing: 10 files in one request for 5¢

Scan smart contracts for vulnerabilities before deployment

competitiveAdvantage: No subscription. Pay exactly what you use. Free tier for hobbyists. x402 micropayments eliminate minimum commitments.
